calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-15-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: C. Salceda.
Petitioner: Mimi Fan, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Dominic Dean Patel, was sworn and examined.
Application and Order Dispensing Notice to Minor's Father, rec'd, filed, granted and signed in open court.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Dominic Paul Fan.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-01-2007 Reset To Feb-15-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
